name: WordPresto Agent Skills
description: Read-only skills for understanding and using WordPresto public Markdown resources.

skills.name: read-wordpresto-site
skills.description: Use WordPresto's llms.txt, Markdown mirrors and full context file to understand the product and public content workflow pages.

skills.name: summarise-wordpresto
skills.description: Summarise WordPresto accurately from canonical Markdown resources without inventing unsupported publishing or commerce capabilities.

skills.name: compare-wordpresto-workflows
skills.description: Compare WordPresto content workflow concepts using the public Worker and workflow Markdown resources.
